name: Security Policy Violation Response
description: Responds to detected security policy violations by documenting the violation, performing AI-powered risk assessment, and enforcing corrective actions. When a policy violation alert is received, Riggs analyzes the severity and intent (accidental vs. intentional), then routes through appropriate response tracks. High-risk violations require manager approval before enforcement; low-risk violations are documented with a warning notification to the user.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Document policy violations and track corrective actions

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify compliance team and user's manager of violations

config.description: Triggers when a security policy violation is detected by DLP, endpoint, or network controls

config.additional_instructions: Assess the security policy violation: determine the violated policy, severity of the breach, whether the violation appears accidental or intentional, data exposure risk, and recommended corrective action.
config.description: AI-powered assessment of the policy violation severity and intent
Routes based on whether the violation is assessed as high-risk requiring immediate enforcement
Manager and compliance officer must approve enforcement action for high-risk violations
Create a high-priority enforcement ticket with approved corrective action
Alert compliance team about the approved enforcement action

notify.message:
SECURITY POLICY VIOLATION NOTICE

Dear {{trigger_1.alert.user_name}},

A violation of the following security policy has been recorded:
Policy: {{trigger_1.alert.policy_name}}
Date: {{trigger_1.alert.timestamp}}

Please review your organization's security policies and ensure future compliance.

If you believe this was recorded in error, please contact the compliance team.

Regards,
Compliance Team

config.description: Send a warning email to the user about the low-risk policy violation

parameters.note: Low-risk policy violation recorded for {{trigger_1.alert.user_email}}. Warning notification sent. Policy: {{trigger_1.alert.policy_name}}

config.description: Document the low-risk violation and warning in the audit trail
Policy violation response complete -- documented, assessed, and appropriate action taken
